global_spec.light_source_notes: All 6 chapters use the same directional light model (upper-right soft diffuse). Chapter 6 nighttime uses moonlight from upper-right with warm golden lighthouse beam as secondary light source.
global_spec.ui_negative_space: Center 60% of screen horizontally kept free from busy foreground elements — reserved for puzzle board overlay
global_spec.tile_seam_notes: Backgrounds are full-bleed JPGs; seamless tiling not required. Board overlays the background as a separate layer.

before.label: 褪色枯岛 — 灰调、枯寂、未修复

in_progress.label: 轮廓找回淡彩 — 色彩局部回归、修复感

restored.label: 完整水彩光效全开 — 满生命力

chapter_specs.scene_name: 海边码头（海边の波止場）
chapter_specs.unique_visual_signature: 木制码头栈桥、停泊渔船、海鸥、灯塔轮廓（远景）、低潮礁石
chapter_specs.sky_far_layer: 低云淡青蓝天、远海地平线、隐约灯塔剪影
chapter_specs.midground_layer: 码头木栈桥、停泊小渔船、木制储物箱
chapter_specs.foreground_elements_layer: 绳索、浮标、礁石、海草、前景木桩

chapter_specs.unique_visual_signature: 石板小路、木质店铺招牌、竹林屏障、晾晒的布帘、花盆与路灯
chapter_specs.sky_far_layer: 暖白晴空、轻云、远处山脉青绿剪影
chapter_specs.midground_layer: 木质两层店铺（杂货铺/茶馆）、竹林、石板广场
chapter_specs.foreground_elements_layer: 木桶花盆、布帘、石灯笼、木牌

chapter_specs.unique_visual_signature: 粉色花田（樱花/波斯菊）、木制观景台、山坡起伏、蝴蝶剪影、花茎摇摆感
chapter_specs.sky_far_layer: 柔粉蓝天、飘落花瓣远景、朦胧山峦
chapter_specs.midground_layer: 花田山坡、木制小观景台、散落树木
chapter_specs.foreground_elements_layer: 近景花丛（樱花/波斯菊）、草叶、蝴蝶点缀

chapter_specs.scene_name: 森林露营地（森のキャンプ場）
chapter_specs.unique_visual_signature: 营地帐篷、篝火台、大树根、苔藓石块、吊床、营地绳灯
chapter_specs.sky_far_layer: 林冠缝隙蓝天或傍晚橙天、远景针叶林剪影
chapter_specs.midground_layer: 大树干、帐篷群、营地木台
chapter_specs.foreground_elements_layer: 苔藓岩石、蕨草、近景树根、营地装饰物

chapter_specs.unique_visual_signature: 露天温泉池（热气袅绕）、竹篱笆、山谷岩石、红叶/雪景、木制浴舍
chapter_specs.sky_far_layer: 暖橙黄夕阳或冬雪天空、远山雪顶（季节感）
chapter_specs.midground_layer: 温泉池、竹篱笆围栏、浴舍木屋
chapter_specs.foreground_elements_layer: 热气蒸腾VFX、岩石苔藓、红叶/雪花、竹节前景
chapter_specs.seasonal_note: 修复后场景可同时呈现红叶与初雪元素（温泉山谷の四季感），与retention-hook-design季节系统预留接口

chapter_specs.unique_visual_signature: 海边悬崖灯塔（全景）、星空、月光海面、灯塔金色光束旋转、夜间礁岸
chapter_specs.sky_far_layer: 深蓝夜空、星点、月亮、远海反光
chapter_specs.midground_layer: 灯塔主体（白底红横纹）、悬崖岩壁、海湾
chapter_specs.foreground_elements_layer: 礁石、夜间海草、浪花、灯塔光束前景投影
chapter_specs.lighting_special: 灯塔金色光束（#F5C842）为场景主光源，上右方月光为辅助光；与标准白日光源方向一致（上右），保证光照模型统一

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor style. Abandoned Japanese island coastal harbor (海边码头). Wooden dock pier, weathered fishing boats moored, stone quay wall, distant lighthouse silhouette on horizon, seagulls resting on pilings. Completely desaturated (8-15% saturation), gray-blue tone, dim faded light. Overcast sky, calm gray water reflecting clouds. Three parallax layers: far sky horizon, mid dock structures, near rope and bollard foreground. Wide 16:9 panoramic composition, center 60% kept clear for puzzle board overlay. Soft organic lines, no sharp edges.
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: No pixel art, no 3D rendering, no neon colors, no pure black #000000, no text or labels, no UI elements, no people, no high contrast, no sharp geometric shapes, no photorealism
prompt_contract.composition: Horizontal panoramic 1920x1080. Sky occupies top 40%, harbor structures mid 35%, foreground elements bottom 25%. Center zone minimally detailed to allow board overlay.

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor style. Japanese island coastal harbor partially restored. Same composition as before-state: wooden dock pier, fishing boats, lighthouse. Colors returning (28-38% saturation), teal-blue hues (#5BBFB5 family) softly emerging, some areas still gray. Morning light quality, partial warmth. Gentle watercolor wash, imperfect edges, healing aesthetic.
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: No pixel art, no 3D rendering, no neon, no pure black, no text, no UI, no people, no high contrast, no sharp geometry, no photorealism
prompt_contract.composition: Same layout as before-state. Horizontal panoramic 1920x1080. Center zone kept clear.

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor style. Vibrant Japanese island coastal harbor fully restored. Sunny harbor scene: teal ocean (#5BBFB5), warm sand dock wood, colorful fishing boats with red/orange accents, seagulls in blue sky, lighthouse bright white with coral stripes in far distance. Full saturation (62-75%), warm soft light from upper-right. Joyful healing atmosphere. Rich watercolor detail, organic brush strokes.
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: No pixel art, no 3D rendering, no neon, no pure black, no text, no UI, no people, no high contrast, no sharp geometry, no photorealism
prompt_contract.composition: Horizontal panoramic 1920x1080. Center zone kept clear for board overlay.

prompt_contract.positive_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor. Abandoned Japanese island village town square. Cobblestone path, closed wooden shops (grocer, tea house), bamboo grove screen, unlit stone lanterns, weathered hanging noren curtains. Fully desaturated (8-15% saturation), gray-green muted tones, overcast. Three parallax layers: far sky + mountains, mid shop buildings + bamboo, near wood barrels + lanterns. 1920x1080 horizontal, center clear.
prompt_contract.negative_prompt: No pixel art, no 3D rendering, no neon, no pure black, no text or labels, no people, no high contrast, no sharp geometric shapes, no photorealism
